name: agent-sandboxing
description: Agent sandboxing for AI coding agents: microVM and kernel-isolated execution environments. Currently covers the kubernetes-sigs/agent-sandbox path on kind, GKE, and kina (Kubernetes-in-Apple-Containers), with Kata, gVisor, and Apple Container microVM substrates. Ships 6 skills + 6 slash commands + nushell scripts. Designed to expand to non-k8s sandboxing paths.
